summary:
Platform engineer with 9 years of experience building and operating distributed systems at scale. Focused on developer productivity, reliability engineering, and the intersection of infrastructure and product.

Passionate about open-source tooling and mentoring engineers transitioning into platform roles.

experience.title: Staff Platform Engineer
experience.subtitle: Veritas Systems · San Francisco, CA
highlights: Designed and led migration of 120 microservices from EC2 to Kubernetes, reducing infra costs by 38% and improving deployment frequency from weekly to on-demand.
Built an internal developer platform (IDP) adopted by 6 product teams; cut new-service onboarding from 3 days to under 2 hours.
Established SLO framework and error-budget policies; p99 latency for critical paths dropped from 340ms to 90ms over 18 months.
Grew and led a team of 5 platform engineers across two time zones.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.subtitle: Meridian Health · Remote
highlights: Re-architected the claims processing pipeline to event-driven (Kafka), enabling real-time fraud detection and reducing processing lag from 4 hours to under 3 minutes.
Led HIPAA compliance initiative across 14 backend services; zero findings in two consecutive external audits.
Mentored 4 junior engineers; 3 were promoted within 18 months.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.subtitle: Loopline Technologies · Austin, TX
highlights: Built core billing infrastructure processing $2M+ monthly recurring revenue.
Introduced contract testing (Pact) across 8 services, reducing integration failures in production by 60%.

education.title: University of Texas at Austin
education.subtitle: BSc · Computer Science
education.description: Graduated with honours. Teaching assistant for Distributed Systems (CS378) for two semesters.

awards.title: Platform Engineering Excellence Award
awards.subtitle: Veritas Systems · 2023
awards.description: Awarded for the IDP project, recognised as the highest-impact internal tooling initiative of the year.

side_projects.title: driftwatch
side_projects.subtitle: open source
side_projects.description: CLI tool for detecting infrastructure drift between Terraform state and live cloud resources. 600+ GitHub stars.

side_projects.title: k8s-cost-exporter
side_projects.subtitle: open source
side_projects.description: Prometheus exporter that surfaces per-namespace and per-deployment cost estimates from cloud billing APIs.
